title: tanacetum aureum var. oligocephalum
intro: Tanacetum aureum var. oligocephalum, also known as Golden Tansy, is a plant species within the Asteraceae family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and small, compact growth habit. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Golden Tansy include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Golden Tansy can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
